# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The location for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator login for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator login password for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "appdb",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "databaseSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU name for the Azure SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "databaseSkuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU tier for the Azure SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "collation": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The database collation."
      }
    },
    "maxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2147483648",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The maximum size of the database in bytes."
      }
    },
    "databaseZoneRedundant": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Whether the database is zone redundant."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "sqlServerResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
    "databaseResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "v12.0",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('databaseSkuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('databaseSkuTier')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "[parameters('collation')]",
        "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]",
        "sampleName": "",
        "zoneRedundant": "[parameters('databaseZoneRedundant')]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('sqlServerResourceId')]"
    },
    "databaseResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('databaseResourceId')]"
    }
  }
}
